creator: alie@affle.com
text:
When i try to:

# shutdown -p now

the screen goes blank, yet the backlight stays on and the HD does not
spin down. I let it idle for 30 minutes and it did nothing at this point.

I've tried shutdown with Linux and Windows the result is those 2 OS'es
shutdown my system completely

How-To-Repeat: Execute

# shutdown -p now
